ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet participating in the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Regatta, Championship) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for registration */,
  "number_of_races" INTEGER /* Total number of races in the event */,
  "scoring_method" TEXT /* Method used for scoring (e.g., Low Point, High Point) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "fleet_type" TEXT /* Type of fleet (e.g., G/H, Classic) */,
  "fleet_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fleet */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of yachts in the fleet */,
  "fleet_rules" TEXT /* Specific rules and regulations for the fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations for the class */,
  "class_size_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum size of yachts in the class */,
  "class_weight_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum weight of yachts in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yachts" (
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yacht */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Sail number of the yacht */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the yacht belongs to */,
  "yacht_name" TEXT /* Name of the yacht */,
  "yacht_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the yacht */,
  "yacht_length" INTEGER /* Length of the yacht */,
  "yacht_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the yacht */,
  "yacht_year_built" INTEGER /* Year the yacht was built */,
  "yacht_registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yacht_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yachts_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "sailor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sailor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sailor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sailor */,
  "sailor_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the sailor */,
  "sailor_experience" TEXT /* Experience level (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "sailor_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the sailor */,
  "sailor_registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Full name of the crew */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the crew */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the crew */,
  "crew_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew */,
  "crew_experience" TEXT /* Experience level (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "crew_registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result belongs to */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time when the yacht finished the race */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Number of the race within the event */,
  "race_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the race started */,
  "race_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the score belongs to */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the yacht in the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the yacht in the event */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Number of the race within the event */,
  "points_awarded" REAL /* Points awarded for the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the ranking belongs to */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the yacht in the event */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Number of the race within the event */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points accumulated by the yacht */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the metric belongs to */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the yacht in the event */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time of the yacht in the event */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Number of the race within the event */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the yacht in the race */,
  "best_lap_time" TEXT /* Best lap time in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the penalty belongs to */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., OCS, DSQ) */,
  "penalty_time" TEXT /* Time when the penalty was assigned */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Number of the race within the event */,
  "penalty_points" REAL /* Points deducted due to the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disqualifications" (
  "disqualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disqualification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the disqualification belongs to */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "disqualification_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disqualification */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Number of the race within the event */,
  "disqualification_date" TEXT /* Date of disqualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disqualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disqualifications_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disqualifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protests" (
  "protest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protest */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the protest belongs to */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "protest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the protest */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Number of the race within the event */,
  "protest_date" TEXT /* Date the protest was filed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protests_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protests_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hearings" (
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hearing */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the hearing belongs to */,
  "protest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protest */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date when the hearing is scheduled */,
  "hearing_time" TEXT /* Time when the hearing is scheduled */,
  "hearing_location" TEXT /* Location of the hearing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hearing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hearings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hearings_protest_id FOREIGN KEY ("protest_id") REFERENCES protests ("protest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the decision belongs to */,
  "protest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protest */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the protest (e.g., Upheld, Dismissed) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_details" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_protest_id FOREIGN KEY ("protest_id") REFERENCES protests ("protest_id")
)
